title: susilkumara anomala
side_effects: Susilkumara anomala can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and vomiting, as well as allergic reactions like hives and itching. Overdosing on the plant's extracts may also lead to headaches, dizziness, and tremors. In rare cases, prolonged use can cause damage to the liver and kidneys, resulting in long-term health complications. It's essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid potential side effects and ensure safe consumption.
